overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through a bustling Manhattan city street on a clear autumn day. The clip follows Spider-Man as he navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes by pedestrians, parked vehicles, and urban landmarks including a theater and subway entrance.

events.description: Spider-Man crosses the street at a marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking at a steady pace past parked cars and crossing the street

notable_agents.action: white sedan parked at the curb near the theater

entered.detail: historic theater with red awning and gold Auerbach Theater lettering
silver sedan parked along the curb
tall office towers lining the city street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Spider-Man walking along a city sidewalk next to the Auerbach Theater. He passes a parked white sedan and crosses the street at a crosswalk, with tall Manhattan skyscrapers visible in the distance and moderate pedestrian activity around.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing various pedestrians

entered.detail: subway entrance with green metal railings and stairs descending underground

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man continues walking along the sidewalk, passing a subway entrance with distinctive green railings on the left. The street is lined with tall buildings creating a canyon-like effect, and pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the busy sidewalk.

events.description: passing large delivery truck parked on the left side

agents.ego_description: navigating around pedestrians while passing a large parked truck

notable_agents.action: large delivery truck parked at the curb with 365 branding

entered.detail: white and red delivery truck with 365 Total Shipping and Ming's logo

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sidewalk passing a large delivery truck parked on the left. The truck partially obscures the view as Spider-Man walks past it, while pedestrians continue to walk along the busy city sidewalk.

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection near the bus stop

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while passing the bus shelter

notable_agents.action: pedestrians wearing red and blue hockey jerseys crossing the street

entered.detail: modern glass and metal bus stop shelter with bench
zebra crossing stripes painted on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses the street at an intersection, passing a bus stop shelter on the left. The scene opens up to a wider view of the intersection, with pedestrians including some wearing hockey jerseys crossing alongside, and sparse vehicle traffic visible.

events.description: continuing across the crosswalk with a group of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking across the crosswalk alongside pedestrians in sports jerseys

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians in red hockey jerseys walking alongside Spider-Man

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, Spider-Man continues crossing the street alongside pedestrians wearing hockey jerseys. The camera follows him across the zebra crossing as he moves through the intersection, with the bus shelter now behind and the city skyline ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling Manhattan corridor that transitions from a narrow theater district into a wide, open city intersection. It begins with Spider-Man walking along a sidewalk past the Auerbach Theater and a parked white sedan before crossing the street toward a canyon of towering skyscrapers. As he continues his path, the camera glides past a subway entrance with green railings and a large delivery truck that momentarily obscures the view of the crowded sidewalk. The scene then opens up as he reaches a bus stop shelter and enters a broad intersection, where the perspective expands to reveal a wider urban vista. Finally, the camera follows him across a zebra crossing alongside pedestrians in hockey jerseys, moving away from the shelter and toward the distant city skyline.
